standingOrders.name: trigger-user-onboarding
standingOrders.description: Automatically runs the user-onboarding skill whenever a user who has no stored profile sends their first message. This is the mechanism that makes onboarding entirely automatic — no commands, no webhooks.
standingOrders.notes: Standing Order was chosen over a Webhook because OpenClaw's Standing Order integrates natively with the memory check, requires no external HTTP endpoint, and keeps all orchestration inside the gateway process. A Webhook approach would require an internet-accessible server and additional delivery-guarantee logic.
